detaileddescription.para: Wrapper functions to be used in GUI recreation macros This avoids having to hardcode the parameter values.

memberdef.argsstring: (dfref dfr, variable epochHLType, variable epoch, variable numEpochs)
memberdef.name: WBP_AddEpochHLTraces

briefdescription.para: Add epoch highlightning traces Uses fill-to-next on specially created waves added before and after the current trace.
Reponsible for adjusting controls which depend on other controls.

detaileddescription.para: Must be called before the changed settings are written into the parameter waves.

briefdescription.para: Passes the data from the WP wave to the panel.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, variable value=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WBP_SetControl

briefdescription.para: Generic wrapper for setting a control's value.
Additional initialhook called in ACL_DisplayTab
Additional finalhook called in ACL_DisplayTab
Returns the row index into the parameter wave of the parameter represented by the named control.

detaileddescription.para:
control
name of the control, the expected format is $str_$sep$row_$suffix where $str may contain any characters but $suffix is not allowed to include the substring _$sep.
All entries are per epoch type and per epoch number except when the $suffix is ALL which denotes that it is a setting for the full stimset.

briefdescription.para: Update the named control and pass its new value into the parameter wave.
Return true if the given stimset is a builtin, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string ctrl, string stimset, string funcList, string func)
memberdef.name: SetAnalysisFunctionIfFuncExists

briefdescription.para: Checks to see if the pulse duration in square pulse stimulus trains is too long.
Convert from the row index of a delta related control to a list of control names.
Depending on the delta operation the visibility of related controls is adjusted.
Return a list of analysis functions including NONE, usable for popup menues.
Return a list of noise types, usable for popup menues.
Return a list of build resolutions , usable for popup menues.
Convert a control entry for the panel or the wave.

detaileddescription.para: Useful if the visualization is different from the stored data.

briefdescription.para: Wavebuilder panel window hook.

detaileddescription.para: The epoch selection is done on the mouseup event if there exists no marquee. This allows to still use the zooming capability.

briefdescription.para: Return distinct colors the sweeps of the wavebuilder.

detaileddescription.para: These are backwards compared to the trace colors

briefdescription.para: Delete the given analysis parameter.
Return a list of all possible analysis parameter types.
Return the analysis parameters.
Return the analysis parameter names for the currently selected stimset.
Fill the listwave from the stimset analysis parameters extracted from its WPT.
Toggle the analysis parameter GUI.

simplesect.para: one if the panel was killed, zero if it was created

briefdescription.para: Function to regenerate code for GetEpochParameterNames()
Return a list of all parameter names of the given epochType.
WBP Panel for creating stimulus sets
